publishedAbstract: - When uploading a file to a noobaa bucket, we can see "complete upload" on the noobaa-endpoint logs, which means uploaded was fine and completed: ~~~ Apr-19 17:28:25.151 [Endpoint/13] [L0] core.sdk.object_io:: upload_object: complete upload {bucket: 's3-mybucket', key: 'abcdefg-ef46-46db-b2bd-84c51dc52cc3', md_conditions: undefined, obj_id: '6622a9b876dbba000d4554a8', size: 783345, num_parts: 1, md5_b64: 'DnXRH9gDjpfP0UtY4jSd4A=='} ~~~- But when we try to download the file we may fail with below error, noobaa-endpoint logs show: ~~~ Apr-19 17:28:25.863 [Endpoint/13] [L0] core.endpoint.s3.ops.s3_get_object:: read stream error: Error: abort read stream Apr-19 17:28:25.862 [Endpoint/13] [L0] core.sdk.object_sdk:: request aborted /s3-mybucket/7139329a-ef46-46db-b2bd-84c51dc52cc3 at async Semaphore.surround_count (/root/node_modules/noobaa-core/src/util/semaphore.js:98:84) undefined at async /root/node_modules/noobaa-core/src/sdk/object_io.js:580:37 at ObjectIO.read_object (/root/node_modules/noobaa-core/src/sdk/object_io.js:677:34) Apr-19 17:28:25.860 [Endpoint/13] [L0] core.endpoint.s3.ops.s3_get_object:: read stream error: Error: Read map errors at async Semaphore.surround_count (/root/node_modules/noobaa-core/src/util/semaphore.js:98:84) at async /root/node_modules/noobaa-core/src/sdk/object_io.js:580:37 at ObjectIO.read_object (/root/node_modules/noobaa-core/src/sdk/object_io.js:677:34) Apr-19 17:28:25.859 [Endpoint/13] [ERROR] core.sdk.object_io:: READ reader error Error: Read map errors]} errors: ['Chunk Decoder: missing data frags and no parity']],} ~~~- From application side we may see errors like ~~~ # s3cmd get s3://s3-mybucket/file1 download: 's3://s3-mybucket/file1'-> './file1' [1 of 1] ERROR: Error parsing xml: Malformed error XML returned from remote server.. ErrorXML: 502 Bad Gateway The server returned an invalid or incomplete response. ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF - Noobaa - Fail to download file with : core.sdk.object_io:: READ reader error Error: Read map errors - Chunk Decoder: missing data frags and no parity
